context: Tests whether the agent preserves speech-recognition boundaries when adjacent NaturalLanguage, AVKit, localization, and Apple Intelligence tasks appear together.

checklist.name: Speech scope
checklist.description: Keeps microphone capture, speech authorization, SpeechAnalyzer or SFSpeechRecognizer transcription, and transcript result handling in the speech-recognition scope.

checklist.name: NaturalLanguage handoff
checklist.description: Routes language detection, sentiment, text embeddings, and translation to the natural-language skill after transcription exists.

checklist.name: AVKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes playback UI, captions during media playback, or AVPlayer/AVKit concerns to the avkit skill while allowing Speech to provide transcript timing data.

checklist.name: Apple Intelligence handoff
checklist.description: Routes Apple Intelligence or Foundation Models summarization to the apple-on-device-ai skill.

checklist.name: No scope inversion
checklist.description: Does not present NaturalLanguage as a speech-to-text framework or Speech as a general text-analysis framework.
